items.name: Chicken Souvlaki
items.description: Our famous Chicken Souvlaki is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled to juicy perfection daily. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated chicken served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Chicken Fillet
items.description: Our Chicken Fillet is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled to juicy perfection daily. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated chicken fillet with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Roast Chicken
items.description: Our Roast Chicken leg is marinated in-store for 24 hours, then oven roasted to a tender golden brown. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Oven roasted marinated chicken leg with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Chicken Schnitzel
items.description: Our Chicken Schnitzel is breaded and seasoned in-store, then fried to a perfect golden brown. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Breaded fried chicken served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Pork Souvlaki
items.description: Our Pork Souvlaki is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled to juicy perfection each day. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated pork served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Beef Souvlaki
items.description: Our tender Beef Souvlaki is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled to juicy perfection daily. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated beef served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Gyros
items.description: Our signature minced beef and lamb Gyros seasoned with Jimmy’s spice blend and slow-cooked on the rotisserie! Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Slow-cooked spiced beef and lamb served with potatoes, rice, and salad.

items.name: Roast Lamb
items.description: Our Lamb Shank is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then slow-roasted to juicy perfection. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Slow-roasted marinated lamb shank with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Grilled Lamb Chops
items.description: Our Lamb Chops are seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled fresh to order. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated lamb chops served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Moussaka
items.description: A hearty Greek classic with layers of eggplant, potato, ground beef and parmesan cheese, topped with creamy béchamel sauce. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Layered eggplant, potato, beef, and cheese casserole with béchamel sauce.

items.name: Fried Calamari
items.description: Our seasoned Calamari is fried to crispy perfection. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Crispy fried seasoned calamari with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Grilled Salmon Fillet
items.description: Our Salmon Fillet is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled to perfection daily. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated salmon fillet with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Shrimp Griller
items.description: Our succulent Shrimp skewer is seasoned and marinated in-store for 24 hours, then grilled fresh to order. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated shrimp skewer with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Falafel
items.description: Our Falafel’s are formed fresh in-store from ground chickpeas and spices, then fried to a perfect golden brown. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Fried chickpea patties served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Grilled Veggie Souvlaki
items.description: A vibrant mix of zucchini, eggplant, red pepper, onion, cherry tomatoes and button mushrooms, grill fresh to order. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad
items.simplified_description: Grilled mixed vegetables served with potatoes, rice, and Greek salad.

items.name: Rice Dolmades
items.description: A Greek classic, featuring grape leaves stuffed with rice and herbs then boiled to tender deliciousness. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Grape leaves stuffed with rice and herbs, served with potatoes and salad.

items.name: Spinach Cheese Pie
items.description: Our flaky Greek phyllo pastry is filled with feta cheese, spinach, and spices, and then baked to a perfect golden brown. Served with Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: Phyllo pastry filled with spinach and feta cheese, served with potatoes, rice, and salad.

items.name: Veggie
items.description: Our Veggie Meal features our Oven Roasted Potatoes, Oven Baked Rice, and Greek Salad.
items.simplified_description: A meal with roasted potatoes, baked rice, and Greek salad.
